description_long: This object is a street sign indicating a parking space reserved for wheelchair users. The sign consists of a blue square with a large white 'P' at the top, denoting parking, and a smaller rectangular sign below featuring the international symbol of access—a stylized wheelchair icon in black on a white background. Both signs are mounted on a slender, vertical metal pole. The pole appears to be made of galvanized steel, providing durability for outdoor urban environments. The signs are flat and smooth, with reflective surfaces to enhance visibility in low light. There are no visible moving parts or additional accessories attached to the sign.
description: A blue and white parking sign for wheelchair users mounted on a metal pole, featuring the international accessibility symbol.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue 'P' parking sign above the white accessibility symbol, both clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the sign and pole, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of both signs and the supporting pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile of the sign and pole.
